form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (17.15) at big odds over 300m at this track. Aided by the inside draw but will need a little luck to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

form.formComment: Yet to taste defeat in two fresh up run, the latest three months ago scoring over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight. Looks one of the hopes in the race.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but ran over at the finish when a narrow fifth (16.72) over 300m at this track. Has the ability to take this out.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd on April 12 over 435m at Sale behind Thunder Rose beaten 2.5 lengths (24.58) in a Grade 4. Thereabouts of late and rates highly this line-up. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Sandown (29.86) in a Grade 5, finishing a 8 length second. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Others rate better this time.

form.formComment: Produced a good effort last start to finish fourth over 300m at this track, beaten 2 lengths (16.95) behind Taste That in a Grade 5 H on April 12. Looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Geelong (30.83) in a Special conditions H, finishing a 10 length fifth. Strong record off the draw with three wins and two minors from seven starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won by 0.8 lengths at this track (19.43) beating Zippi Mustang in a Grade 5 on April 10. Solid claims this line-up.
